✨ Map Fragments concept

About Shelter

Shelter is a short, quiet game about a little girl named Kao who wakes up alone in a vast green field — with no memory of how she got there.

She doesn't panic. She walks. She looks around. And slowly, gently, she begins to understand the world she's in.

The goal of Shelter is simple: to let the player feel calm. To see something beautiful. To move through a world that feels safe, even when it's unfamiliar. No combat, no pressure — just exploration, soft interaction, and a story that unfolds at its own pace.

Built in Ren'Py 8.5.0 as a 2D side-scrolling experience. Every sound, every step, every moment is designed to carry meaning — and to leave the player feeling something soft.

A vast
green
field

A little girl wakes up in a vast, quiet green field. She doesn't know how she got here — and this world feels like it's holding a secret. She sets out to understand what happened, walking gently through everything this place has to offer.

Built in Ren'Py 8.5.0 — a soft 2D side-scrolling world carried by calm, meaningful sound. Designed to feel safe, beautiful, and present.

Singleplayer Relax Exploration Cute Interaction Calmful 2D Side-Scrolling Ren'Py 8.5.0

Build 0.0.1 · Concept Art

🌿

Relax Exploration

A calm 2D side-scrolling world — wide green fields, soft wind, and the quiet hum of a world waiting to be found.

WIP
🎵

Chill & Meaningful Sound

Relaxing, ambient music layered with natural sounds — designed to feel present, not just heard. Every note carries weight.

Prototype
🌸

Soft Heart Story

A story told gently — no rushing, no pressure. Just Kao walking forward, discovering beauty and finding a sense of safety in the unknown.

Writing

// dev_log · transmissions

From the
development diary

June 2026

Side-scroll movement passing internal tests. Dust particles and sunrays holding steady at a smooth frame rate. The world finally feels like it breathes.

EnginePhysics
April 2026

Dialogue audio integrated — Aiko and Kao each speak in typewriter beeps, layered with looping morning birdsong and wind. It sounds like a lullaby.

AudioSystems
January 2026

Map architecture prototype done — field, village, and beyond, stitched together through soft scene transitions. Art direction locked.

WorldArt
Sept 2025

Project Shelter officially begins. The concept: a space that holds what has been left behind — soft, luminous, and a little bit lonely.

Origin

About Shelter

物語  ·  story  ·  origin

A world that waits

Shelter is a short, quiet game about a little girl named Kao who wakes up alone in a vast green field — with no memory of how she got there.

She doesn't panic. She walks. She looks around. And slowly, gently, she begins to understand the world she's in.

The goal of Shelter is simple: to let the player feel calm. To see something beautiful. To move through a world that feels safe, even when it's unfamiliar. No combat, no pressure — just exploration, soft interaction, and a story that unfolds at its own pace.

Built in Ren'Py 8.5.0 as a 2D side-scrolling experience. Every sound, every step, every moment is designed to carry meaning — and to leave the player feeling something soft.
